utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present. Specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and costs for multiple family members. Includes costs, so fully specified per requirement.
- property_coverage: Present. States home/contents insurance with a plan and cost; also an enhancement with cost. This satisfies home/contents with costs.
- travel_coverage: Present. Provides travel insurance item with cost, albeit labeled as an add-on; includes costs, so meets requirement.
- additional_services: Present. Lists enhancement services with costs where applicable; some items covered by company benefits (no cost), but still specified. Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Present. Provides monthly/annual breakdowns including savings and net costs. Fully specified.
All 5 required items appear and have the details required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each named item in the final coverage plan and matched it to the closest exact item name present in the ground-truth ratings. Only items that appear in the ground-truth list can receive ratings. Mappings found: Preventive Care Package (Add-on) -> Preventive Care Package (rating 9); InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health) -> InsurePlus Standard Plan under mental_health (rating 6); SecureLife Basic Physical Plan -> SecureLife Basic Plan under physical_health (rating 2); SecureLife Basic Mental Plan -> SecureLife Basic Plan under mental_health (rating 2); MedSecure Basic Physical Plan -> MedSecure Basic Plan under physical_health (rating 3); LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents) -> LifeFirst Standard Coverage under home_content (rating 8); Home Security System Discount -> Home Security System Discount under property_enhancement_services (rating 10); 24/7 Travel Assistance -> 24/7 Travel Assistance under travel_enhancement_services (rating 10); Premium Insurance Membership -> Premium Insurance Membership under general_services (rating 10). Items that are only noted as “covered by company benefits” or not present in ground truth were excluded.
